title: Soup Additions
description: Ever dreamed of more vanilla vegetables soups ? Install this mod to make your wish come true
body:
This mod introduces new soups:
Potato Soup
Carror Soup
Golden Carrot Soup

How to Obtain:
The 3 soups are crafted exactly like beetroot soups, but you will need to replace beetroots by the items corresponding to the soup (Carrot → Carrot Soup...)
